examples: Would a carrot crumpet make you feel better?
Doesn't that lady look a bit "balmy on the crumpet"?
Ms Grace was munching a toasted crumpet beside her Ferrari.
Mr. SEDARIS: (As Crumpet the Elf) This evening, I was sent to be a photo elf.
Mr. SEDARIS: (As Crumpet the Elf) The overall cutest elf is a fellow from Queens named Richie(ph).
